scope_note: QA E8 Embedding Orbit Classifier Cert family [249]: canonical (b,e,d,a)→ℤ^8 embedding into Wildberger E_8 root lattice (cert [244]). Verifies (1) m=9 T-orbit partition {1,8,24,24,24} sum 81; (2) closed-form Q(E_diag(b,e))=2(b²+e²+d²+a²)-2(bd+ea+da) symbolic + exhaustive on [1..9]²; (3) per-orbit min Q under E_diag = (8,16,28,72,162) is a 5-distinct complete T-orbit classifier; (4) per-orbit Q-multisets pairwise distinct under both E_diag and E_tri. E_diag canonical, E_tri recorded informationally. Builds on (Wildberger, 2020) Mutation Game; companion file: ~/Downloads/MutationGameCoxeterGraphs.pdf. Theory: docs/theory/QA_E8_EMBEDDING_AND_ADE.md §A. Cross-refs (Wildberger, 2003) simply-laced and (Humphreys, 1972) GTM 9.
